title: Fadyenia laurifolia
taxonomy: Fadyenia laurifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae, native to Australia. It is a member of the subfamily Lomandroideae, within the Asparagaceae family. The plant is known to be a type of lilyturf or lilyturf grass, which is a common name for some species of Lomandra and Astelia. Fadyenia laurifolia is often confused with Lomandra, but it can be distinguished by its unique leaf shape and growth habits. Further classification within the Fadyenia genus may be necessary to accurately understand its relationships within the plant kingdom.
